message:
fix(snapshots): normalize usernames and version numbers in tests

Add masking for:
- Owner usernames (Owner: user → Owner: USERNAME)
- Version numbers (version 0.1.7 → version X.Y.Z)
- Fix VERSION_RE to also match HEAD@ prefix

This ensures snapshot tests pass regardless of the local username
or version being tested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@ source: tests/snapshots/cli_output.rs
 expression: normalize_output(&output.stdout)
 ---
 ○ ID-REDACTED · Test issue with description   [● P2 · OPEN]
-Owner: ubuntu · Type: task
+Owner: USERNAME · Type: task
 Created: YYYY-MM-DD · Updated: YYYY-MM-DD

@@ -2,4 +2,4 @@
 source: tests/snapshots/cli_output.rs
 expression: normalize_output(&output.stdout)
 ---
-br version 0.1.7 (dev) (BRANCH@GIT_HASH)
+br version X.Y.Z (dev) (BRANCH@GIT_HASH)
